specs.title: should load without console errors
should have a valid <title> tag
should have a meta description
should have exactly one <h1> element
should have a viewport meta tag for mobile
should render the main navigation bar
should be focusable via keyboard (Tab navigation)
should navigate to the Pricing page
all images should have alt attributes
all form inputs should have accessible labels
interactive elements should have visible focus outlines
page should paint within 3 seconds
bundle should not include obviously large un-lazy-loaded chunks
should render a 404 page for unknown routes
should switch between light and dark themes
